content.en:
The aura of many supreme Dao ancestors locked the forbidden fire lotus, and whoever made a move would hit him.

For a while, no one of the Supreme True Ancestors could help anyone.

The Wind King is very strong, and he is also doing his best to help the Fire King snatch the Forbidden Fire Lotus, but it is of little use at all, there are too many Supreme True Ancestors here, and he is not the only one who can contend with it.

All of a sudden, this magma volcano and the adjacent territory were destroyed, and only this forbidden fire lotus was left standing here.

No one dares to destroy the Forbidden Fire Lotus, but no one wants to snatch the Forbidden Fire Lotus easily.

Abrupt.

A terrifying aura descended, causing many Supreme True Ancestors to stop.

"There is an invincible Dao Ancestor coming!"

The Wind King frowned.

He didn't expect that a forbidden treasure would actually attract the attention of the Invincible Dao Ancestor and actually descend in person.

At the level of the Invincible Dao Ancestor, the general forbidden treasure is useless, at most it is used to cultivate the lineage, and what is useful to them is undoubtedly the rare forbidden treasure.

But this forbidden fire lotus should not be considered particularly rare, and it is very likely that it will only be of great help to the supreme Dao Ancestor of the Great Dao of Fire, and it should not be of much help to the Invincible Dao Ancestor.

It stands to reason that the Invincible Dao Ancestor should not wake up and come.

At the same time, he was a little curious about which invincible Dao Ancestor was coming.

Click!

The void cracked, and a figure stepped out.

This person's face is white and cold, like a handsome son, but like a ruthless killer, with his hands behind his back, showing an invincible posture.

Seeing this person, the three Supreme True Ancestors of the Mitian Sect saluted one after another: "Meet the Peerless Dao Ancestor!"

"It's him!"

All the supreme Dao ancestors have changed color.

Peerless Dao Ancestor, one of the invincible Dao Ancestors of the Mitian Sect, and a relatively young Dao Ancestor, or one of their former juniors.

Before the rise of the unequaled Daozu, there was a reputation of a peerless son in the vast sea realm, very graceful, but after being betrayed by a woman, the style of painting completely changed, becoming ruthless, and anyone who disobeyed him, he killed them all.

On the path of the growth of the Peerless Dao Ancestor, it was full of bloody killings.

But his talent was very fast, although he was not able to break through the shackles of the Invincible True Ancestor and the Supreme True Ancestor, but he also reached the extreme of the Invincible True Ancestor, and dominated an era with several other Invincible True Ancestors.

"This forbidden fire lotus, I want it!"

Wushuang Dao Ancestor said coldly.

A supreme Dao Ancestor spoke: "Peerless Dao Ancestor, as soon as you come, you will ask for a forbidden treasure, it is too domineering!"

"Noise!"

The Peerless Dao Ancestor made a move, and one hand turned into white jade, which was a supreme Dao technique, and it was also his famous Dao Technique-Baijing Tongtian Hand!

Rumble!!!!

In an instant, that Supreme Dao Ancestor was knocked away, and a hole was punched out of his chest.

Of course, such an injury could not kill the Supreme Dao Ancestor, but it really injured the Supreme Dao Ancestor.

If you continue to attack many times, you may be able to kill him by really hurting him.

"It's a pity, if my strength is not suppressed, killing a supreme Dao Ancestor like you, three moves are enough!"

This is not bragging, but the truth.

Under the suppression of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, an invincible Dao Ancestor like him was suppressed even more, and now the strength he exerted was between the extreme of the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor and the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and the strength exerted by the Supreme Dao Ancestor was between the ordinary Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor and the top Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Therefore, it would take a little time for the Peerless Dao Ancestor to kill a Supreme Dao Ancestor under such circumstances.

But if he really stared at a supreme Dao Ancestor and didn't give up, and attacked him with all his might, he could definitely kill him.

After that supreme Dao Ancestor was injured, he didn't dare to speak, lest the Peerless Dao Ancestor really kill him at all costs.

Then.

The Fire King was very unwilling, and seemed to want to do something.

Seeing this, the Wind King hurriedly said, "Fire King, don't be impulsive!"

He was afraid that the Fire King would be desperate to snatch the Forbidden Fire Lotus, so even if he did, he would inevitably be hunted down by the Peerless Dao Ancestor.

In that case, neither of them would be the opponents of the Peerless Dao Ancestor, and the Fire King would most likely fall as a result.

"I understand!"

The Fire King replied.

But then, he added: "But I'm not reconciled, this is my only chance!"

Hearing this, the Wind King's expression changed and he wanted to stop it, but it was too late.

Swish!

The Fire King came to the Forbidden Fire Lotus as fast as he could, and reached out to grab the Forbidden Fire Lotus.

Rumble!!!!

The great horror has befallen you.

In an instant, the Fire King was hit hard, after all, this was a great terror of the Forbidden Treasure, and the other Supreme Dao Ancestors did not dare to take it directly.

But he never expected that the Fire King would be so reckless, and he directly reached out to grab the forbidden fire lotus.

"Close!"

The forbidden fire lotus was put away by the Fire King, and the heavy injuries on his body were also recovered in an instant with a recovery treasure, but he was still in a state of not being lightly injured.

"Fire King, you are looking for death!"

Wushuang Dao Ancestor was furious.

He had already announced that this Forbidden Fire Lotus was his, and there were still people who dared to snatch the Forbidden Fire Lotus from him.

Although he didn't care much about this Forbidden Fire Lotus, and he didn't just come to the Forbidden Land of Huoyan this time just for a Forbidden Fire Lotus, he would never allow a Supreme Dao Ancestor to snatch the Forbidden Fire Lotus with him.

What's more, the Fire King actually grabbed it.

He hadn't noticed the Fire King's actions before, and neither did the other Supreme Dao Ancestors, because they hadn't expected the Fire King to make a move.

"Damn, the strength of this guy is not strong, and there was no hope of obtaining the Forbidden Fire Lotus! But my arrival has made many Supreme Dao Ancestors stop, if the Fire King finally escapes with the Forbidden Fire Lotus, how will the outside world publicize me?"

Wushuang Dao Ancestor thought to himself.

At that time, I'm afraid that many people will say that he is a wage earner who works for the Fire King!

As soon as he thought of this, his murderous intent boiled.

Shout!

The Peerless Dao Ancestor moved, rushing in front of the Fire King at an extremely fast speed.

"White and pure heavenly hand!"

The white jade-like hand tore through all the rules and killed in front of the Fire King.

I saw a set of black armor appear on the Fire King's body, which was the top Dao weapon defense armor of Black Wind Mountain.

At the same time, a fiery red shroud appeared on the Fire King's body, and there seemed to be an Ancient Chaos Golden Crow roaring and soaring on the cover, this was his Fire Defense Dao Technique-Taiwu Golden Cover!

However, all these defenses were useless in front of the Peerless Dao Ancestor.

Burst!

The Taiwu Gold Cover was forced, and the Fire King's armor was then torn apart by the Peerless Dao Ancestor.

Bang!

The Fire King flew upside down, smashing a large area of magma.

Originally, the Fire King was not lightly injured, and this time it was even more severe.

Abrupt.

In the void, a big hand with only taboo rules slapped down, as if it was about to completely kill the Fire King.

The Fire King struggled to resist and cast a Dao technique, conjuring up countless Ancient Chaos Golden Crows, which collided with the Peerless Dao Ancestor's palm Dao technique.

Thundered!!!!

The void shakes, and the rules collapse.

The Fire King was injured again and again, and he didn't dare to fight with the Peerless Dao Ancestor again, so he turned into his body, and it was an Ancient Chaos Golden Crow.

I saw that after the Fire King turned into the Ancient Chaos Golden Crow, as soon as his wings spread, he was about to turn into a rainbow light and tear through the void and escape.

However, at this moment, the eyes of the Peerless Dao Ancestor turned into two cold rays of light, directly piercing through the Fire King's wings.

Then, the Peerless Dao Ancestor appeared above the Fire King's head and broke the Fire King's body with a single punch.

Boom!

The huge body of the Fire King fell and turned into a human form again, but it was already very miserable, and its combat power was reduced to a very weak level.

"Peerless Dao Ancestor, please be merciful!"

The Wind King finally spoke.

"Wind King, do you want to find death too?" said Wushuang Dao Ancestor in a cold voice.

The Wind King hurriedly said: "Peerless Dao Ancestor, my strength is indeed inferior to yours, but if you kill the Fire King, our Black Wind Mountain will fight with you endlessly!"

"Threaten me?" "Peerless Dao Ancestor laughed, "Is my Peerless Dao Ancestor a threatened person, I will kill the Fire King today, and then kill you, the Wind King, I will see how Black Wind Mountain fights with me endlessly!"

Saying that, the Peerless Dao Ancestor condensed a forbidden spear, and he was going to use this forbidden spear to kill the Fire King.

"Go!"

The Forbidden Spear stabbed at the Fire King.

The Wind King wanted to stop it, but was locked by the breath of the Peerless Dao Ancestor, and he flew it out with one hand.

However, just as the forbidden spear was about to fall on the Fire King, a large fiery red hand suddenly appeared, annihilating the Peerless Dao Ancestor's forbidden spear with one palm.

Then, a figure shrouded in flames walked out.

Seeing this person, the Fire King hurriedly rejoiced: "Master!"
